base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of peach — a character (playable) from 1992 super mario kart. Princess Peach — drops coins as her special. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Princess Peach — drops coins as her special
